title: failed to mmp when use bind mount
body:
### Issue Description

i just run this commannd in my mac m2, and it issue like:
```bash
$ podman run --rm -it -p 9090:9090 -v $(pwd):/prometheus --user 0:0 prom/prometheus:v2.46.0                            130 ↵ 
ts=2023-09-20T08:30:35.316Z caller=main.go:541 level=info msg="No time or size retention was set so using the default time retention" duration=15d
ts=2023-09-20T08:30:35.317Z caller=main.go:585 level=info msg="Starting Prometheus Server" mode=server version="(version=2.46.0, branch=HEAD, revision=cbb69e51423565ec40f46e74f4ff2dbb3b7fb4f0)"
ts=2023-09-20T08:30:35.317Z caller=main.go:590 level=info build_context="(go=go1.20.6, platform=linux/arm64, user=root@42454fc0f41e, date=20230725-12:37:33, tags=netgo,builtinassets,stringlabels)"
ts=2023-09-20T08:30:35.317Z caller=main.go:591 level=info host_details="(Linux 6.4.15-200.fc38.aarch64 #1 SMP PREEMPT_DYNAMIC Thu Sep  7 00:51:10 UTC 2023 aarch64 40df65556270 (none))"
ts=2023-09-20T08:30:35.318Z caller=main.go:592 level=info fd_limits="(soft=524288, hard=524288)"
ts=2023-09-20T08:30:35.318Z caller=main.go:593 level=info vm_limits="(soft=unlimited, hard=unlimited)"
ts=2023-09-20T08:30:35.332Z caller=query_logger.go:105 level=error component=activeQueryTracker msg="Failed to mmap" file=/prometheus/queries.active Attemptedsize=20001 err="invalid argument"
panic: Unable to create mmap-ed active query log

goroutine 1 [running]:
github.com/prometheus/prometheus/promql.NewActiveQueryTracker({0xffffc5171ee6, 0xb}, 0x14, {0x374a840, 0x400004d1d0})
        /app/promql/query_logger.go:123 +0x2fc
main.main()
        /app/cmd/prometheus/main.go:647 +0x6710
```

I have tried this in orbstack docker, it`s ok event i not set the user to root.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

just run ` podman run --rm -it -p 9090:9090 -v $(pwd):/prometheus --user 0:0 prom/prometheus:v2.46.0` in termianl.

### Describe the results you received

got error like "failed to mmap"

### Describe the results you expected

it should be ok like orbstack docker:
```bash
$ docker run --rm -it -p 9090:9090 -v $(pwd):/prometheus --user 0:0 prom/prometheus:v2.46.0                                                                                      130 ↵
ts=2023-09-20T08:35:37.309Z caller=main.go:541 level=info msg="No time or size retention was set so using the default time retention" duration=15d
ts=2023-09-20T08:35:37.309Z caller=main.go:585 level=info msg="Starting Prometheus Server" mode=server version="(version=2.46.0, branch=HEAD, revision=cbb69e51423565ec40f46e74f4ff2dbb3b7fb4f0)"
ts=2023-09-20T08:35:37.309Z caller=main.go:590 level=info build_context="(go=go1.20.6, platform=linux/arm64, user=root@42454fc0f41e, date=20230725-12:37:33, tags=netgo,builtinassets,stringlabels)"
ts=2023-09-20T08:35:37.309Z caller=main.go:591 level=info host_details="(Linux 6.4.16-orbstack-00103-g02b40eb69695 #1 SMP Wed Sep 13 10:13:30 UTC 2023 aarch64 bee8a30acd51 (none))"
ts=2023-09-20T08:35:37.309Z caller=main.go:592 level=info fd_limits="(soft=1048576, hard=1048576)"
ts=2023-09-20T08:35:37.309Z caller=main.go:593 level=info vm_limits="(soft=unlimited, hard=unlimited)"
ts=2023-09-20T08:35:37.311Z caller=web.go:563 level=info component=web msg="Start listening for connections" address=0.0.0.0:9090
ts=2023-09-20T08:35:37.311Z caller=main.go:1026 level=info msg="Starting TSDB ..."
ts=2023-09-20T08:35:37.313Z caller=tls_config.go:274 level=info component=web msg="Listening on" address=[::]:9090
ts=2023-09-20T08:35:37.313Z caller=tls_config.go:277 level=info component=web msg="TLS is disabled." http2=false address=[::]:9090
ts=2023-09-20T08:35:37.318Z caller=head.go:595 level=info component=tsdb msg="Replaying on-disk memory mappable chunks if any"
ts=2023-09-20T08:35:37.318Z caller=head.go:676 level=info component=tsdb msg="On-disk memory mappable chunks replay completed" duration=1.792µs
ts=2023-09-20T08:35:37.318Z caller=head.go:684 level=info component=tsdb msg="Replaying WAL, this may take a while"
ts=2023-09-20T08:35:37.319Z caller=head.go:755 level=info component=tsdb msg="WAL segment loaded" segment=0 maxSegment=0
ts=2023-09-20T08:35:37.319Z caller=head.go:792 level=info component=tsdb msg="WAL replay completed" checkpoint_replay_duration=423.206µs wal_replay_duration=410.164µs wbl_replay_duration=0s total_replay_duration=864.62µs
ts=2023-09-20T08:35:37.321Z caller=main.go:1047 level=info fs_type=65735546
ts=2023-09-20T08:35:37.321Z caller=main.go:1050 level=info msg="TSDB started"
ts=2023-09-20T08:35:37.321Z caller=main.go:1231 level=info msg="Loading configuration file" filename=/etc/prometheus/prometheus.yml
ts=2023-09-20T08:35:37.322Z caller=main.go:1268 level=info msg="Completed loading of configuration file" filename=/etc/prometheus/prometheus.yml totalDuration=431.206µs db_storage=667ns remote_storage=708ns web_handler=375ns query_engine=541ns scrape=185.707µs scrape_sd=24.791µs notify=23.209µs notify_sd=23.749µs rules=1.125µs tracing=15.625µs
ts=2023-09-20T08:35:37.322Z caller=main.go:1011 level=info msg="Server is ready to receive web requests."
ts=2023-09-20T08:35:37.322Z caller=manager.go:1009 level=info component="rule manager" msg="Starting rule manager..."
```

### Upstream Latest Release

comments.body: does the file `/prometheus/queries.active` exist?  If so, what is its size?
thinking more about it, it might fail because the volume is on a network file system

> Looks like the same as #19639

I already read #19639 before make this issue.  if I do't use `--user 0:0` option,  the error like this, notice  the `permission denied`。 

```bash
$ podman run --rm -it -p 9090:9090 -v $(pwd):/prometheus prom/prometheus:v2.47.0                                                                                                   2 ↵
ts=2023-09-21T01:12:15.445Z caller=main.go:539 level=info msg="No time or size retention was set so using the default time retention" duration=15d
ts=2023-09-21T01:12:15.446Z caller=main.go:583 level=info msg="Starting Prometheus Server" mode=server version="(version=2.47.0, branch=HEAD, revision=efa34a5840661c29c2e362efa76bc3a70dccb335)"
ts=2023-09-21T01:12:15.446Z caller=main.go:588 level=info build_context="(go=go1.21.0, platform=linux/arm64, user=root@409eb5e6b30c, date=20230906-10:27:30, tags=netgo,builtinassets,stringlabels)"
ts=2023-09-21T01:12:15.446Z caller=main.go:589 level=info host_details="(Linux 6.4.15-200.fc38.aarch64 #1 SMP PREEMPT_DYNAMIC Thu Sep  7 00:51:10 UTC 2023 aarch64 db1c57af6fb7 (none))"
ts=2023-09-21T01:12:15.447Z caller=main.go:590 level=info fd_limits="(soft=524288, hard=524288)"
ts=2023-09-21T01:12:15.447Z caller=main.go:591 level=info vm_limits="(soft=unlimited, hard=unlimited)"
ts=2023-09-21T01:12:15.448Z caller=query_logger.go:93 level=error component=activeQueryTracker msg="Error opening query log file" file=/prometheus/queries.active err="open /prometheus/queries.active: permission denied"
panic: Unable to create mmap-ed active query log

goroutine 1 [running]:
github.com/prometheus/prometheus/promql.NewActiveQueryTracker({0xffffd9286ee6, 0xb}, 0x14, {0x382c2c0, 0x400017b0e0})
	/app/promql/query_logger.go:123 +0x2f8
main.main()
	/app/cmd/prometheus/main.go:645 +0x6830
```

> thinking more about it, it might fail because the volume is on a network file system
> does the file `/prometheus/queries.active` exist? If so, what is its size?

no, it is just directory on my Mac m2.  I will show this:
```bash
~/test
$ pwd
/Users/billow/test

~/test
$ ls -al
total 0
drwxr-xr-x    4 billow  staff   128 Sep 15 16:47 .
drwxr-x---+ 112 billow  staff  3584 Sep 21 09:15 ..
drwxr-xr-x    2 billow  staff    64 Sep 15 16:47 a
drwxr-xr-x    2 billow  staff    64 Sep 15 16:47 b

~/test
$ podman run --rm -it -p 9090:9090 -v $(pwd):/prometheus --user 0:0 --entrypoint sh prom/prometheus:v2.47.0
/prometheus # ls -a
.   ..  a   b
/prometheus # prometheus --config.file /etc/prometheus/prometheus.yml
ts=2023-09-21T01:17:41.580Z caller=main.go:539 level=info msg="No time or size retention was set so using the default time retention" duration=15d
ts=2023-09-21T01:17:41.581Z caller=main.go:583 level=info msg="Starting Prometheus Server" mode=server version="(version=2.47.0, branch=HEAD, revision=efa34a5840661c29c2e362efa76bc3a70dccb335)"
ts=2023-09-21T01:17:41.582Z caller=main.go:588 level=info build_context="(go=go1.21.0, platform=linux/arm64, user=root@409eb5e6b30c, date=20230906-10:27:30, tags=netgo,builtinassets,stringlabels)"
ts=2023-09-21T01:17:41.582Z caller=main.go:589 level=info host_details="(Linux 6.4.15-200.fc38.aarch64 #1 SMP PREEMPT_DYNAMIC Thu Sep  7 00:51:10 UTC 2023 aarch64 785515a09295 (none))"
ts=2023-09-21T01:17:41.582Z caller=main.go:590 level=info fd_limits="(soft=524288, hard=524288)"
ts=2023-09-21T01:17:41.583Z caller=main.go:591 level=info vm_limits="(soft=unlimited, hard=unlimited)"
ts=2023-09-21T01:17:41.596Z caller=query_logger.go:105 level=error component=activeQueryTracker msg="Failed to mmap" file=data/queries.active Attemptedsize=20001 err="invalid argument"
panic: Unable to create mmap-ed active query log

goroutine 1 [running]:
github.com/prometheus/prometheus/promql.NewActiveQueryTracker({0x2f2e09f, 0x5}, 0x14, {0x382c2c0, 0x40007cc870})
	/app/promql/query_logger.go:123 +0x2f8
main.main()
	/app/cmd/prometheus/main.go:645 +0x6830
/prometheus # ls -al ./data/queries.active
-rw-r--r--    1 root     nobody       20001 Sep 21 01:17 ./data/queries.active
/prometheus # exit

~/test
$ ls
a    b    data

~/test
$ cd data

~/test/data
$ ls
queries.active

~/test/data
$ ll
total 0
-rw-r--r--  1 billow  staff    20K Sep 21 09:17 queries.active

~/test/data
$ cat queries.active queries.active

~/test/data
$
```
I think this can be closed since it is a duplicate of https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/19639 as @Luap99 pointed out.
